ValidationRule.description: Created to ensure alternative email is set where the Alternative Email is selected for a notification
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: ISBLANK(tc9_pr__Alternative_Email__c) = TRUE && OR( ISPICKVAL( tc9_et__Timesheet_Notification_Email__c , 'Alternative'), ISPICKVAL( tc9_pr__Leave_Notification_Email__c , 'Alternative') )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Please set the alternative email address when selecting 'Alternative' as an approver
